推荐场景: 服务台｜说明昨天的小事故
60秒任务: 「出了小问题」：过去事件时间线；A=重复确认后完成；B=猜测/乱确认翻车。
目标功能: 过去时｜事件顺序｜人物地点动作｜结果｜简单原因
场景族: 真实成人生活场景｜公共空间｜工作/学习空间｜家庭空间｜线上场景
推荐掌握的高价值、高频、可复用句型、短语、习语、固定搭配 池:
What happened?（询问事件）
I lost my phone.（丢东西）
My bag was missing.（物品不见）
The bus was late.（交通问题）
I missed my train.（错过）
I couldn’t open the door.（打不开门）
I asked for help.（求助）
A staff member helped me.（解决）
I called the hotel.（联系）
It was a small problem.（问题性质）
I was worried, but it was okay.（情绪+结果）
First, I checked my bag.（顺序一）
Then I found my phone.（顺序二）
I was late because of traffic.（原因）
Everything is fine now.（收尾）
推荐掌握的核心词汇、词组池:
Nouns: phone, bag, bus, train, door, staff, hotel, traffic, problem, help
Verbs: lost, missed, opened, asked, helped, called, checked, found
Adjectives: late, missing, worried, okay, small, fine
Time / Place: yesterday, now, first, then, at the hotel, because of traffic
Chunks: what happened, ask for help, small problem, found my phone, because of traffic
